docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: Flan is built as a modern C++20 project using CMake and supports both serial and hybrid MPI/OpenMP execution. This page walks you through installing and building Flan on laptops, workstations, and HPC systems such as Perlmutter.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Before building Flan, ensure the following dependencies are available:

docs.title: Required
docs.text:
• C++20-capable compiler
  • GCC ≥ 11
  • CMake ≥ 3.20
  • OpenMP support
  • MPI implementation (for parallel runs)
  • MPICH, OpenMPI, Cray-MPICH, etc.

docs.title: Optional
docs.text:
• HDF5 — for background plasma profiles
  • OpenADAS rate tables — for ionization/recombination physics
  • Python + NumPy — for post-processing and analysis
